author: Xbox YouTube
text:
RACCOIN | Announcement Trailer
RACCOIN is coming to XBOX this Autumn. 

RACCOIN is a roguelike deckbuilder where you combine special coins with powerful items to trigger wildly satisfying combos. Stack shiny towers, spin the lucky wheel, and shake the machine until all the coins drop.

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Ready for a Summer of Action? | This Week on XBOX
This week, Nicolas Cage is locked and loaded for Call of Duty and Warzone, Age of Empires offers up cross play between PC and your phone, plus a new update speeds into Forza Horizon 6.
